title: neobrachyactis roylei
intro: Neobrachyactis roylei, also known as the Himalayan slipper orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine preparations.
